title: Phat trien ung dung voi Database Backend
summary: Ket noi ung dung (Web/Desktop/Mobile) voi MySQL database: kien truc 3-tier, Python/FastAPI backend, REST API, ORM, va input validation.
content_html:
Application Development — Phát triển ứng dụng với Database

Ứng dụng thực tế kết nối database qua database connector, không phải MySQL Workbench trực tiếp.

1. Kiến trúc 3-Tier

Ba tầng: Presentation (UI: Web/Desktop/Mobile) ↔ Application (Business logic: Python/FastAPI) ↔ Data (MySQL database).

2. Kết nối Python với MySQL

import mysql.connector

db = mysql.connector.connect(
    host='localhost', user='app_user',
    password='securePass123', database='archery_db'
)
cursor = db.cursor()

SELECT

cursor.execute('SELECT ArcherID, ArcherName FROM Archer')
archers = cursor.fetchall()
for a in archers:
    print(a[0], a[1])

INSERT (Prepared Statement — an toan)

query = 'INSERT INTO Score (ArcherID, RoundID, TotalScore) VALUES (%s, %s, %s)'
cursor.execute(query, (archer_id, round_id, total))
db.commit()

3. FastAPI REST API

from fastapi import FastAPI
app = FastAPI()

@app.get('/archers')
def get_archers():
    cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM Archer')
    return cursor.fetchall()

@app.post('/scores')
def add_score(data: dict):
    cursor.execute('INSERT INTO Score VALUES (%s,%s,%s)',
        (data['archer_id'], data['round_id'], data['total']))
    db.commit()
    return {'id': cursor.lastrowid}

4. Use Case: Archery Score App

Ứng dung ghi diem ban cung (vi du tu bai giang):

  • Chon Archer tu danh sach (SELECT FROM Archer)
  • Chon Round & Range (SELECT JOIN)
  • Nhap diem tung mui ten (6 arrows/end)
  • Luu vao database (INSERT + COMMIT)
  • Xem Personal Bests: MAX(TotalScore) GROUP BY ArcherID

Personal Best Query

SELECT a.ArcherName, a.Equipment,
       MAX(s.TotalScore) AS PersonalBest,
       MAX(s.ScoreDate)  AS DateAchieved
FROM Archer a
INNER JOIN Score s ON a.ArcherID = s.ArcherID
GROUP BY a.ArcherID, a.ArcherName, a.Equipment
ORDER BY PersonalBest DESC;

5. Client-side Validation

function validateArcherID() {
  var id = document.getElementById('archerid').value;
  var regex = /^[0-9]+$/;
  if (!regex.test(id)) { alert('ArcherID must be numeric.'); }
}
Lua y: Client-side validation co the bi bypass. Server phai validate lai.

6. ORM — SQLAlchemy

from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, declarative_base
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String

Base = declarative_base()

class Archer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'archer'
    archer_id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name      = Column(String(100))

with Session(engine) as session:
    archers = session.query(Archer).all()

exercises.title: 3-Tier Data
exercises.prompt: Trong kien truc 3-tier, tang nao chua MySQL database?

exercises.title: Prepared Statement Python
exercises.prompt: Cach INSERT an toan voi mysql-connector Python:
exercises.options_json: ["cursor.execute('INSERT INTO T VALUES ' + str(val))", "cursor.execute('INSERT INTO T VALUES (%s)', (val,))", "cursor.execute(f'INSERT INTO T VALUES {val}')", "cursor.query(val)"]

exercises.title: db.commit()
exercises.prompt: Sau INSERT, can goi gi de luu vinh vien?

exercises.title: REST POST
exercises.prompt: HTTP method nao de tao moi mot score?

exercises.title: Personal Best
exercises.prompt: Query nao lay diem cao nhat cua tung Archer?
exercises.options_json: ["SELECT MAX(TotalScore) FROM Score", "SELECT ArcherID, MAX(TotalScore) FROM Score GROUP BY ArcherID", "SELECT TotalScore FROM Score ORDER BY TotalScore DESC LIMIT 1", "SELECT TotalScore WHERE isPersonalBest=1"]
exercises.answer: SELECT ArcherID, MAX(TotalScore) FROM Score GROUP BY ArcherID

exercises.title: Client validation
exercises.prompt: Tai sao khong chi dua vao JavaScript validation?
exercises.options_json: ["JavaScript cham", "Client-side co the bi bypass, server phai validate lai", "JavaScript khong ho tro regex", "Browser khong chay JavaScript"]
exercises.answer: Client-side co the bi bypass, server phai validate lai

exercises.title: ORM
exercises.options_json: ["Chuyen database sang NoSQL", "Lam viec voi database theo OOP ma khong can viet SQL tho", "Tang toc query", "Tao backup tu dong"]
exercises.answer: Lam viec voi database theo OOP ma khong can viet SQL tho

exercises.title: fetchall()
exercises.options_json: ["Chi dong dau tien", "Tat ca dong ket qua", "So luong dong", "True/False"]

exercises.title: dictionary=True
exercises.prompt: cursor = db.cursor(dictionary=True) cho phep truy cap:
exercises.options_json: ["row[0], row[1]", "row['ArcherName']", "Tu dong in man hinh", "Chuyen sang JSON"]

exercises.title: lastrowid
exercises.options_json: ["So dong bi anh huong", "AUTO_INCREMENT ID cua dong vua INSERT", "True neu thanh cong", "Ten bang"]
exercises.answer: AUTO_INCREMENT ID cua dong vua INSERT
